title: createStore
description: Creates a reactive store proxy for managing nested state.
param_value_desc: Initial store value. Must be an object.
returns_store: <0>store</0>: a reactive proxy. Property access is tracked.
usage_the_manifest_shape: The site publisher models the deployed site as a <0>Manifest</0> of hashed files. Each <1>ManifestEntry</1> carries a path, hash, and size, and the store keeps this nested shape reactive.
usage_a_reactive_manifest: <0>createManifestStore</0> walks the build directory and hands the resulting manifest to <1>createStore</1>. The returned proxy tracks reads down to individual entries, so a component that renders one file only re-runs when that file's hash changes.
in_the_wild: See this store drive incremental uploads in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
